childhood.familyBackground: Son of Jung Jae-eun (Shinsegae honorary chairman) and Lee Myung-hee (Shinsegae chairman). The Shinsegae Group is a major South Korean retail conglomerate.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 정재은 신세계 명예회장과 이명희 신세계 회장의 장남. 신세계그룹은 한국의 대표 유통 기업이다.
childhood.education: Seoul National University (Western History) - 1 year, Brown University (Economics) - graduated 1994
childhood.earlyLife: Born September 19, 1968, to one of South Korea's most prominent retail families. He spent his early years in Seoul before moving to the United States for higher education. After graduating from Brown University in 1994, he worked briefly at Fujifilm Korea before joining Shinsegae in 1995, launching his family business career at age 27.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 1968년 9월 19일 한국 유통업의 대표 가문에서 태어났다. 서울에서 성장한 후 미국으로 유학을 떠났다. 1994년 브라운대학교 졸업 후 한국후지쯔에서 1년 근무하다가 1995년 27세의 나이로 신세계에 입사하여 가업을 계승했다.

careerTimeline.event: Joined Shinsegae as Strategy Planning Assistant Manager
Promoted to Executive Managing Director at Planning & Coordination Division
Became Vice President of Management Support Division
Appointed Vice Chairman of Shinsegae Group
Promoted to Chief Representative Director and General Manager of Shinsegae
Emart separated from Shinsegae; Chung becomes Vice Chairman of Emart retail division
careerTimeline.eventKo: 신세계와 이마트 분할, 이마트 마트·호텔 부문 부회장 취임

quotes.text: The shot you don't attempt has a 100% chance of missing
quotes.context: New Year's address to employees, citing ice hockey legend Wayne Gretzky, encouraging entrepreneurial spirit
quotes.contextKo: 임직원들에게 도전 정신을 독려하기 위해 아이스하키 전설 웨인 그레츠키의 명언을 인용한 신년사

quotes.text: One must develop humanities education beyond mere credentials
quotes.context: Emphasis on balanced education and cultural development for next-generation business leaders
quotes.contextKo: 차세대 경영인에게 필요한 균형잡힌 교육과 문화적 소양의 중요성 강조

personalTraits.knownFor: Leading Shinsegae retail empire; aggressive expansion of Emart; digital transformation initiatives
personalTraits.knownForKo: 신세계 유통 제국 경영; 이마트 적극 확장; 디지털 트랜스포메이션 추진
